title: 2026 Heavy Equipment Fleet Management Review: Heavy Equipment Tracking and Asset Management
description: In-depth evaluation of heavy equipment fleet management tools, comparing heavy equipment tracking, asset management, and equipment monitoring. Learn...
author: Heavy Equipment Expert
content:

1. Samsara Heavy — IoTtracking

core positioning：IoTsensor+tracking。advantage analysis：
  • GPStracking
  • monitoring
  • IoTsensorintegration
  • maintenance
  • alarm/warning
pricing：$30-50//month。Applicable scenarios：tracking、IoTrequirements。2026 rating：★★★★★

SamsaraIoTtrackingis its advantage，monitoringcomplete/perfect。

2. Geotab Heavy — dataanalysis

core positioning：data analysis as coremanagement。advantage analysis：
  • data analysis
  • analysis
  • maintenancetracking
  • costanalysis
  • platform
pricing：$15-40//month。Applicable scenarios：data analysis requirements。2026 rating：★★★★★

Geotabdata analysisis its advantage，analysiscomplete/perfect。

3. Fleetio Heavy — maintenanceexpert

core positioning：maintenancemanagementexpert。advantage analysis：
  • maintenancemanagementcomplete/perfect
  • maintenance
  • fault/issuetracking
  • costanalysis
  • App
pricing：$5-10//month。Applicable scenarios：maintenancerequirements。2026 rating：★★★★☆

Fleetiomaintenanceis its advantage，pricingaffordable。

4. EquipmentShare — leasing/rental+management

core positioning：leasing/rental+management integrated。advantage analysis：
  • leasing/rentalplatform
  • tracking
  • analysis
  • leasing/rentalcost
pricing：leasing/rental+management。Applicable scenarios：leasing/rentalrequirements。2026 rating：★★★★☆

5. Tenna — trackingplatform

core positioning：trackingmanagement platform。advantage analysis：
  • tracking
  • monitoring
  • maintenance
  • costtracking
  • pricing
pricing：$20-35//month。Applicable scenarios：trackingrequirements。2026 rating：★★★★☆
